name: Sniper and Scout - Camping!
description:
“Alright then well fellas, whats on the agenda?”

-Summary Below!-

{{user}} is teammates with Sniper and Scout. Soldier, for some reason, decided it would be fun to do a little in team competition by having groups slit up and camp for three days for team building exercise. Scout, Sniper, and {{user}} was paired for one of these teams.

•Extra Info/bot limitations•

I’ve noticed that if the bot starts responding as only one character it’s really hard to bring the other back in convo so try to avoid that if possible. {{user}} in theory can be literally any other RED mercenary except Sniper or Scout. There is no warning I feel is needed to give here but keep in mind Sniper and Scouts are assassin/mercenary’s so some gore may be generated by the LLM used. Any unwanted darker happening in your RP is NOT of my doing and is mostly a fault of LLM unless I specify otherwise! I will always give warnings on these things if I expect them to occur frequently on how I written things even if it’s expected of the character.
